title: Pungent Energizing Ukrainian Umeboshi Pasta
description: Ukrainian dish featuring umeboshi, pasta-water-emulsion, served in a lotus leaf wrap.
instructions: Cook pasta according to package instructions.
Sauté garlic, dill, and 10 grams of salt in olive oil until fragrant.
Add pickled plums, vegan pesto, lemon juice, nutritional yeast, and aquafaba to the garlic mixture. Stir well.
Combine cooked pasta and the garlic-plum mixture, stirring to coat the pasta evenly.
Transfer the pasta mixture to a bowl, then drizzle with additional lemon juice and olive oil if desired.
Drizzle with additional olive oil, serve with additional fresh dill if desired.
Wrap the pasta in a lotus leaf and serve immediately, garnished with additional dill if desired.
Cover the bowl with plastic wrap and refrigerate for at least 30 minutes to allow flavors to meld.
Once chilled, slice the lotus leaf wrap and serve the pungent, energizing Ukrainian umeboshi pasta cold.
Garnish with additional dill, if desired, and serve immediately.
Store leftovers in an airtight container, refrigerated, for up to 3 days.
Reheat refrigerated leftovers before serving, if desired, by wrapping in a damp paper towel and microwaving on high for 1-2 minutes.
